title.en: China-to-Jamaica Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入牙买加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入牙買加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Jamaica BSJ standards context, OUR regulatory oversight, JPS grid interconnection expectations, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid evidence, IEC 61000 and IEC 62920 EMC evidence, and Jamaica's 110/220 V, 50 Hz grid conditions — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与牙买加BSJ标准背景、OUR监管、JPS电网接入要求、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网证据、IEC 61000和IEC 62920 EMC证据，以及牙买加110/220 V、50 Hz电网条件——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與牙買加BSJ標準背景、OUR監管、JPS電網接入要求、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網證據、IEC 61000和IEC 62920 EMC證據，以及牙買加110/220 V、50 Hz電網條件——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSJ standards interpretation, OUR regulatory determination, JPS grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current BSJ standards adoption, OUR rules, JPS interconnection requirements, project-owner requirements, and electrical-code obligations with qualified Jamaica professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSJ标准解释、OUR监管裁定、JPS并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格牙买加专业人士核验现行BSJ标准采纳、OUR规则、JPS接入要求、项目业主要求和电气规范义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSJ標準解釋、OUR監管裁定、JPS併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格牙買加專業人士核驗現行BSJ標準採納、OUR規則、JPS接入要求、項目業主要求和電氣規範義務。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Jamaica, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming BSJ standards adoption and any import conformity route for the specific inverter; (2) preparing IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence; (3) preparing IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence for JPS interconnection review; (4) preparing IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC and harmonic evidence; and (5) validating firmware and protection settings against Jamaica's 110/220 V, 50 Hz grid conditions. Jamaica uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but its US-influenced 110 V single-phase and 220 V split-phase service is materially different from China's 220/380 V baseline. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence should not be treated as automatically accepted in Jamaica.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口牙买加时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认BSJ标准采纳及特定逆变器的进口合格评定路径；（2）准备IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（3）为JPS并网审查准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（4）准备IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC及谐波证据；（5）针对牙买加110/220 V、50 Hz电网条件验证固件和保护设置。牙买加与中国同为50 Hz，但其受美国影响的110 V单相和220 V分相供电与中国220/380 V基准存在实质差异。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024证据不应被视为在牙买加自动接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口牙買加時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認BSJ標準採納及特定逆變器的進口合格評定路徑；（2）準備IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（3）為JPS併網審查準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（4）準備IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC及諧波證據；（5）針對牙買加110/220 V、50 Hz電網條件驗證韌體和保護設置。牙買加與中國同為50 Hz，但其受美國影響的110 V單相和220 V分相供電與中國220/380 V基準存在實質差異。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024證據不應被視為在牙買加自動接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
